prompt: I want to register a new account on the agent-messenger with username 'testuser' and pin '5678', then send a message to alice saying 'hello from testuser'. Show me the exact commands to run.

assertions.text: Includes register command with correct username 'testuser' and pin '5678'
Includes send command targeting alice with correct message text
assertions.check: response contains 'send alice' and 'hello from testuser'

assertions.text: Commands use 'go run .' invocation (or built binary) from cli/ directory
assertions.check: response mentions 'go run .' or a binary path

assertions.text: Register command comes before send command
assertions.check: register appears before send in the response
